summary: Dakon is a Czech heating boiler and HVAC brand, now part of Daikin Industries Czech Republic s.r.o. Founded in 1924, Daikin is a global leader in HVAC with significant presence in Central/Eastern Europe. Dakon brand focuses on heating boilers, wall-hung gas boilers, and heating solutions for Czech and Slovak markets. Manufacturing operations in Plzeň, Czech Republic. Revenue ~€740 million, 152 employees in Czech entity.
notes: Part of Daikin group - large scale purchasing. Heating boilers need circulating pumps. Czech market entry point. Use general email for initial contact.
